caption: The video captures a formal event, likely a conference or seminar, taking place in a well-lit room with wooden paneling and closed blinds. A man with long hair and glasses stands at a podium on the right side of the frame, speaking into a microphone while holding papers. He appears to be addressing an audience seated in rows of chairs facing him. On the left side of the frame, another person is seated at a desk with a microphone, possibly moderating or assisting with the event. The audience members, dressed in casual and semi-formal attire, are attentively listening to the speaker. The atmosphere suggests a serious and engaged discussion, with the "ORCA" logo visible in the bottom right corner, indicating the organization or theme of the event.
